name: preset-api-skills
description: Preset API skills for explicit direct API workflows only. Do not use for MCP-only work.

interface.shortDescription: Direct API-only Preset skills. Do not use for MCP-only work.
interface.longDescription: Markdown skills for agents using the public Preset Management API, workspace Superset APIs, and Snowflake Cortex Agent APIs. Use only when the user explicitly asks for direct API access, API credentials, REST endpoints, curl/Python requests, Superset workspace API inspection, or Snowflake Cortex API/operator workflows. Do not use for MCP-only work or as a fallback from MCP tools; MCP-only work must stay on available MCP tooling unless the user explicitly approves switching to direct API.
defaultPrompt: List audit logs for my Preset team
List dashboards in a Preset workspace
Review a Preset SQL execution request
Run a Snowflake Cortex Agent safely
